name: phoenix-current-software
description: Phoenix Current Software (PCS) — Service Fusion v1 API integration. Monorepo with shared utilities + MCP server + Claude Code plugin.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @phoenix/shared && npm run build -w @phoenix/servicefusion-mcp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @phoenix/shared && npm run typecheck -w @phoenix/servicefusion-mcp
